corrections.note: Printed word is κακοπαθείας split across the line; transcript has placeholder dots instead of visible letters.
Image appears to read ἆθλα; no change needed, included?
The supporting siglum after εντεηκε is A, not ℵ.
Variant word is μεροφρῆναι; transcript misread multiple letters.

notes: Running head and body are otherwise consistent with the scan. Main body issue is unresolved placeholder in κακοπαθείας. Apparatus contains a clear siglum misread and a clear misreading of μεροφρῆναι.
